name: Meeting Action Item Tracker
description: Extracts action items from Teams meeting transcripts, assigns them to owners, creates Planner tasks, and sends follow-up reminders. Ask me to extract action items from a meeting, check open items, or remind your team about overdue tasks.
instructions: See instructions.md for the full system prompt.

conversation_starters.text: Extract action items from my 2pm standup meeting
What action items from last week's planning meeting are still open?
Remind everyone with overdue action items from the Q2 kickoff
Create a Planner task for the action items from today's meeting
